data.name: btClearim.ToolTip
data.value: Remove Unknown Sims from this list

data.name: btchngeOwn.ToolTip
data.value: Owner information is not held in this BNFO, this changes the owner value in the Lot file (LTXT)

data.name: btaddim.ToolTip
data.value: This just adds an employee to here. You may need to open the sim's SDSC file and add the business data and career.

data.name: btdelety.ToolTip
data.value: This just removes the employee from here. You may need to open the sim's SDSC file and clear any business data and career.

data.name: tbunknown.ToolTip
data.value:
This is Catched Fair Pay The value is re-calculated on the fly so changing it here may be pointless
the value is $15 base rate plus $1 per skill point plus $5 per bronze talent badge plus $10 per silver talent badge plus $15 per gold talent badge plus *$70 for manager (A bug in the game prevents that from working!)
